steps.name: Login to the site as 'Company admin' with '0827.011129.25.admin@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0827.011129.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
